headline: Steel producers tease Q1 earnings surge, citing higher prices
summary: Nucor Corp. and Steel Dynamics are projecting a $1-per-share surge from the previous quarter as tariffs on imported steel bolster domestic production and demand.

raw.headline: Steel producers tease Q1 earnings surge, citing higher prices
raw.summary: Nucor Corp. and Steel Dynamics are projecting a $1-per-share surge from the previous quarter as tariffs on imported steel bolster domestic production and demand.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $213
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Timna Tanners   maintains Nucor (NYSE:NUE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $197 to $213.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $213

headline: This Stock Has No Business Being This Good and It Just Keeps Going
summary: This highly cyclical company has increased its dividend annually for 53 years, which is an incredible feat.
